title: Governed agents: Looker + MCP explained
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates how to use Looker's semantic layer, the Model Context Protocol (MCP), and the Agent Development Kit (ADK) to build governed agents that ground LLMs in validated business models rather than direct SQL generation. The Looker MCP Server bridges Large Language Models and enterprise data systems.
